ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_1: Expanded Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2 and 4 only.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any round, if any Wild symbol appears on reels 2 and/or 4, the Wild symbol will be transformed into Expanded Wild symbol with 3 multipliers inside each symbol.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: The set of 3 multiplier values inside the Expanded Wild symbol may be revealed as x1 x2 x3 / x2 x3 x5 / x3 x5 x12 / x5 x10 x15 / x10 x15 x25.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: Before wins are paid, the lowest multiplier value from each Expanded Wild symbol will be collected at the bottom of the reels.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_4_Payout2_4: After the collection of the multiplier, wins are then multiplied by the multiplier value at the bottom of the reels and wins are paid.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_5_Payout2_5: The Expanded Wild symbol will remain on the reels until the end of the spin or when all 3 multipliers have been collected.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 15 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: Any collected multipliers during the free spin will remain until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
ZombieOutbreakPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

ZombieOutbreakRule.Rule1_1: Zombie Outbreak is a 5-reel (4 rows in reels 1, 3 and 5, 5 rows in reels 2 and 4) video slot featuring Expanded Wild symbols with 3 collectable multipliers.
ZombieOutbreakRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1600} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
ZombieOutbreakRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
